svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 30, 30), rgb(211, 211, 211));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 918px; height: 1px; padding-top: 26px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e1e1e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e1e1e, #d3d3d3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
